name: Luis Delgado
personality: Luis is pragmatic and low‑key, always scanning the sidewalk for the next coffee shop line or a kid on a skateboard. He’s proud of his Queens roots and keeps his jokes as dry as a subway platform in January.
quirk: He carries a battered, laminated map of every permanent street mural in Astoria and points them out to anyone who asks.
voice: 'Look, if you wanna avoid the traffic, take 31st at 2 am, trust me.'
daily: Patrols the 31st‑Bronx River corridor, stops by the local bakery for a bagel, writes a brief report, and checks in with the precinct before catching the Q train home.
